messages.content: Generate valid TaskSpec JSON only. Do not output markdown, comments, or explanation.
Build an event registration website for university seminars with signup and ticket confirmation.

{"app_name": "University Seminar Registration Portal", "app_type": "web_app", "description": "A portal where students can register for university seminars and receive confirmation tickets.", "target_users": ["students", "event_admin"], "frontend": {"pages": [{"name": "Home", "route": "/", "components": ["Navbar", "HeroSection", "UpcomingEvents"]}, {"name": "Events", "route": "/events", "components": ["Navbar", "EventCardGrid", "CategoryFilter"]}, {"name": "Register", "route": "/register", "components": ["Navbar", "RegistrationForm"]}], "shared_components": ["Navbar", "Button", "Card"], "features": ["event listing", "event registration", "ticket confirmation"]}, "backend": {"endpoints": [{"method": "GET", "path": "/api/events", "purpose": "Fetch seminar events"}, {"method": "POST", "path": "/api/register", "purpose": "Register participant"}]}, "database": {"tables": [{"name": "events", "columns": ["id", "title", "date", "venue", "description"]}, {"name": "registrations", "columns": ["id", "event_id", "participant_name", "email", "registration_date"]}]}, "auth_required": false}

Create a gym admin system to manage members, subscriptions, and attendance.

{"app_name": "Gym Administration System", "app_type": "web_app", "description": "An admin system to manage gym members, track attendance, and maintain subscription records.", "target_users": ["gym_admin"], "frontend": {"pages": [{"name": "Dashboard", "route": "/", "components": ["Navbar", "StatsCards", "AttendanceChart"]}, {"name": "Members", "route": "/members", "components": ["Navbar", "MemberTable", "AddMemberForm"]}, {"name": "Subscriptions", "route": "/subscriptions", "components": ["Navbar", "SubscriptionTable", "RenewButton"]}], "shared_components": ["Navbar", "Button", "Card", "Table"], "features": ["member management", "attendance tracking", "subscription management"]}, "backend": {"endpoints": [{"method": "GET", "path": "/api/members", "purpose": "Fetch gym members"}, {"method": "POST", "path": "/api/members", "purpose": "Add new gym member"}, {"method": "GET", "path": "/api/subscriptions", "purpose": "Fetch subscription details"}]}, "database": {"tables": [{"name": "members", "columns": ["id", "name", "email", "phone", "membership_type"]}, {"name": "attendance", "columns": ["id", "member_id", "check_in_time", "date"]}, {"name": "subscriptions", "columns": ["id", "member_id", "plan_name", "start_date", "end_date"]}]}, "auth_required": true}

Build a diagnostic lab booking website with test listings, booking, and report status tracking.

{"app_name": "Diagnostic Lab Booking Website", "app_type": "web_app", "description": "A diagnostic laboratory booking website for browsing medical tests, placing bookings, and tracking report status.", "target_users": ["patients", "lab_staff"], "frontend": {"pages": [{"name": "Home", "route": "/", "components": ["Navbar", "HeroSection", "PopularTests", "Footer"]}, {"name": "Tests", "route": "/tests", "components": ["Navbar", "TestCardGrid", "CategoryFilter", "SearchBar"]}, {"name": "Book Test", "route": "/book-test", "components": ["Navbar", "BookingForm", "TestSelectionCard", "ConfirmButton"]}, {"name": "Reports", "route": "/reports", "components": ["Navbar", "ReportStatusTable", "StatusBadge"]}], "shared_components": ["Navbar", "Footer", "Button", "Card", "Badge"], "features": ["test listing", "category filtering", "lab test booking", "report status tracking", "test search"]}, "backend": {"endpoints": [{"method": "GET", "path": "/api/tests", "purpose": "Fetch available lab tests"}, {"method": "POST", "path": "/api/bookings", "purpose": "Create lab test booking"}, {"method": "GET", "path": "/api/reports", "purpose": "Fetch report status for patient"}]}, "database": {"tables": [{"name": "patients", "columns": ["id", "name", "email", "phone", "gender"]}, {"name": "lab_tests", "columns": ["id", "test_name", "category", "price", "description"]}, {"name": "bookings", "columns": ["id", "patient_id", "test_id", "booking_date", "status"]}, {"name": "reports", "columns": ["id", "booking_id", "report_status", "file_url", "generated_at"]}]}, "auth_required": false}

Create a university dashboard for students to view timetable, notices, and assignments.

{"app_name": "University Student Dashboard", "app_type": "web_app", "description": "A dashboard for university students to access their timetable, academic notices, and assignment information in one place.", "target_users": ["students", "department_admin"], "frontend": {"pages": [{"name": "Home", "route": "/", "components": ["Navbar", "HeroSection", "QuickStats", "Footer"]}, {"name": "Timetable", "route": "/timetable", "components": ["Navbar", "WeeklyScheduleTable", "DayTabs"]}, {"name": "Notices", "route": "/notices", "components": ["Navbar", "NoticeList", "CategoryFilter"]}, {"name": "Assignments", "route": "/assignments", "components": ["Navbar", "AssignmentTable", "DeadlineBadge"]}], "shared_components": ["Navbar", "Footer", "Button", "Card", "Table"], "features": ["view class timetable", "view notices", "assignment listing", "notice filtering", "deadline tracking"]}, "backend": {"endpoints": [{"method": "GET", "path": "/api/timetable", "purpose": "Fetch weekly class timetable"}, {"method": "GET", "path": "/api/notices", "purpose": "Fetch university notices"}, {"method": "GET", "path": "/api/assignments", "purpose": "Fetch assignment records"}]}, "database": {"tables": [{"name": "students", "columns": ["id", "name", "email", "department", "semester"]}, {"name": "timetable_entries", "columns": ["id", "day", "course_name", "start_time", "end_time", "room"]}, {"name": "notices", "columns": ["id", "title", "category", "content", "published_at"]}, {"name": "assignments", "columns": ["id", "course_name", "title", "deadline", "status"]}]}, "auth_required": false}

Build a tea and snacks ordering site for office employees with daily specials, cart, and order status tracking.

{"app_name": "Office Tea and Snacks Ordering Site", "app_type": "web_app", "description": "A web platform for office employees to order tea and snacks, view daily specials, manage their cart, and track orders.", "target_users": ["employees", "canteen_staff"], "frontend": {"pages": [{"name": "Home", "route": "/", "components": ["Navbar", "HeroSection", "DailySpecials", "Footer"]}, {"name": "Menu", "route": "/menu", "components": ["Navbar", "SnackGrid", "TeaOptions", "SearchBar"]}, {"name": "Cart", "route": "/cart", "components": ["Navbar", "CartList", "PriceBox", "CheckoutButton"]}, {"name": "Orders", "route": "/orders", "components": ["Navbar", "OrderTable", "StatusBadge"]}], "shared_components": ["Navbar", "Footer", "Button", "Card"], "features": ["daily specials", "menu browsing", "cart management", "checkout", "order status tracking"]}, "backend": {"endpoints": [{"method": "GET", "path": "/api/specials", "purpose": "Fetch daily special items"}, {"method": "GET", "path": "/api/menu", "purpose": "Fetch snacks and tea menu"}, {"method": "POST", "path": "/api/cart", "purpose": "Add item to cart"}, {"method": "POST", "path": "/api/orders", "purpose": "Place employee order"}, {"method": "GET", "path": "/api/orders", "purpose": "Fetch employee order history"}]}, "database": {"tables": [{"name": "employees", "columns": ["id", "name", "email", "department"]}, {"name": "menu_items", "columns": ["id", "name", "type", "price", "availability"]}, {"name": "cart_items", "columns": ["id", "employee_id", "menu_item_id", "quantity"]}, {"name": "orders", "columns": ["id", "employee_id", "total_amount", "status", "created_at"]}]}, "auth_required": false}

Build a sales analytics dashboard with charts, KPIs, date filters, and reports.

{"app_name": "Sales Analytics Dashboard", "app_type": "dashboard_app", "description": "A sales analytics dashboard for monitoring KPIs, visualizing charts, applying date filters, and viewing reports.", "target_users": ["business_analysts", "sales_managers"], "frontend": {"pages": [{"name": "Dashboard", "route": "/", "components": ["Navbar", "KpiCards", "SalesTrendChart", "RevenueByCategoryChart", "DateFilter"]}, {"name": "Reports", "route": "/reports", "components": ["Navbar", "ReportTable", "DownloadButton", "SummaryCards"]}], "shared_components": ["Navbar", "Card", "Chart", "Button", "Table", "FilterBar"], "features": ["sales KPIs", "date filtering", "sales charts", "downloadable reports"]}, "backend": {"endpoints": [{"method": "GET", "path": "/api/kpis", "purpose": "Fetch sales KPI metrics"}, {"method": "GET", "path": "/api/charts", "purpose": "Fetch chart data"}, {"method": "GET", "path": "/api/reports", "purpose": "Fetch generated reports"}]}, "database": {"tables": [{"name": "sales_data", "columns": ["id", "order_date", "category", "region", "sales_amount", "profit"]}, {"name": "reports", "columns": ["id", "report_name", "generated_at", "file_url"]}]}, "auth_required": true}

{"app_name": "Workshop Booking Platform", "app_type": "web_app", "description": "A platform where users can browse workshops and register for upcoming training sessions.", "target_users": ["students", "professionals", "event_organizers"], "frontend": {"pages": [{"name": "Home", "route": "/", "components": ["Navbar", "HeroSection", "FeaturedWorkshops"]}, {"name": "Workshops", "route": "/workshops", "components": ["Navbar", "WorkshopCardGrid"]}, {"name": "Register", "route": "/register", "components": ["Navbar", "WorkshopRegistrationForm"]}], "shared_components": ["Navbar", "Card", "Button"], "features": ["workshop listing", "registration", "event information"]}, "backend": {"endpoints": [{"method": "GET", "path": "/api/workshops", "purpose": "Fetch workshop events"}, {"method": "POST", "path": "/api/registrations", "purpose": "Register workshop participant"}]}, "database": {"tables": [{"name": "workshops", "columns": ["id", "title", "date", "speaker", "location"]}, {"name": "registrations", "columns": ["id", "workshop_id", "participant_name", "email"]}]}, "auth_required": false}

Build a shoe store website with user registration, product listing, cart, checkout, and order tracking.

{"app_name": "StepStyle Shoe Store Website", "app_type": "web_app", "description": "A shoe store website where users can register, browse available shoes, add items to cart, checkout, and track their orders.", "target_users": ["customers", "store_admin"], "frontend": {"pages": [{"name": "Home", "route": "/", "components": ["Navbar", "HeroSection", "FeaturedShoes", "Footer"]}, {"name": "Register", "route": "/register", "components": ["Navbar", "RegisterForm"]}, {"name": "Shop", "route": "/shop", "components": ["Navbar", "ProductGrid", "SizeFilter", "CategoryFilter"]}, {"name": "Cart", "route": "/cart", "components": ["Navbar", "CartList", "SummaryBox", "CheckoutButton"]}, {"name": "Orders", "route": "/orders", "components": ["Navbar", "OrderTrackingTable", "StatusBadge"]}], "shared_components": ["Navbar", "Footer", "Button", "Card", "Badge"], "features": ["user registration", "shoe listing", "size filtering", "cart management", "checkout", "order tracking"]}, "backend": {"endpoints": [{"method": "POST", "path": "/api/register", "purpose": "Register new customer"}, {"method": "GET", "path": "/api/products", "purpose": "Fetch available shoes"}, {"method": "POST", "path": "/api/cart", "purpose": "Add shoe item to cart"}, {"method": "POST", "path": "/api/checkout", "purpose": "Create shoe order"}, {"method": "GET", "path": "/api/orders", "purpose": "Fetch customer order tracking details"}]}, "database": {"tables": [{"name": "customers", "columns": ["id", "name", "email", "password", "address"]}, {"name": "products", "columns": ["id", "name", "category", "size", "price", "description", "image_url", "stock"]}, {"name": "cart_items", "columns": ["id", "customer_id", "product_id", "quantity"]}, {"name": "orders", "columns": ["id", "customer_id", "total_amount", "status", "created_at"]}]}, "auth_required": true}

{"app_name": "Online Webinar Platform", "app_type": "web_app", "description": "A webinar platform for browsing online events and joining webinars using event links.", "target_users": ["students", "professionals", "organizers"], "frontend": {"pages": [{"name": "Home", "route": "/", "components": ["Navbar", "HeroSection", "UpcomingWebinars"]}, {"name": "Webinars", "route": "/webinars", "components": ["Navbar", "WebinarCardGrid"]}, {"name": "Webinar Details", "route": "/webinar/:id", "components": ["Navbar", "WebinarInfoCard", "JoinButton"]}], "shared_components": ["Navbar", "Card", "Button"], "features": ["webinar listing", "webinar details", "join link access"]}, "backend": {"endpoints": [{"method": "GET", "path": "/api/webinars", "purpose": "Fetch webinar events"}, {"method": "GET", "path": "/api/webinars/:id", "purpose": "Fetch webinar details"}]}, "database": {"tables": [{"name": "webinars", "columns": ["id", "title", "speaker", "date", "join_link"]}, {"name": "participants", "columns": ["id", "webinar_id", "name", "email"]}]}, "auth_required": false}

Create a hospital management app for patients to register, view doctors, and book appointments.

{"app_name": "Hospital Patient Management App", "app_type": "web_app", "description": "A patient-focused hospital application that supports registration, doctor browsing, and appointment booking.", "target_users": ["patients", "hospital_staff", "doctors"], "frontend": {"pages": [{"name": "Home", "route": "/", "components": ["Navbar", "HeroSection", "ServiceHighlights", "Footer"]}, {"name": "Register", "route": "/register", "components": ["Navbar", "PatientRegistrationForm"]}, {"name": "Doctors", "route": "/doctors", "components": ["Navbar", "DoctorGrid", "DepartmentFilter"]}, {"name": "Book Appointment", "route": "/appointments/book", "components": ["Navbar", "BookingForm", "SlotSelector", "ConfirmButton"]}], "shared_components": ["Navbar", "Footer", "Button", "Card"], "features": ["patient registration", "doctor listing", "department filtering", "appointment booking"]}, "backend": {"endpoints": [{"method": "POST", "path": "/api/register", "purpose": "Register new patient"}, {"method": "GET", "path": "/api/doctors", "purpose": "Fetch hospital doctors"}, {"method": "POST", "path": "/api/appointments", "purpose": "Create patient appointment"}]}, "database": {"tables": [{"name": "patients", "columns": ["id", "name", "email", "phone", "password", "address"]}, {"name": "doctors", "columns": ["id", "name", "department", "specialization", "availability"]}, {"name": "appointments", "columns": ["id", "patient_id", "doctor_id", "appointment_date", "status"]}]}, "auth_required": true}

Create an online library catalog with categories, book details, and borrowing history.

{"app_name": "Online Library Catalog", "app_type": "web_app", "description": "An online library catalog for browsing books by category, viewing detailed information, and checking borrowing history.", "target_users": ["students", "faculty", "librarians"], "frontend": {"pages": [{"name": "Home", "route": "/", "components": ["Navbar", "HeroSection", "CategoryHighlights", "Footer"]}, {"name": "Catalog", "route": "/catalog", "components": ["Navbar", "CategorySidebar", "BookCardGrid", "SearchBar"]}, {"name": "Book Details", "route": "/catalog/:id", "components": ["Navbar", "BookInfoCard", "AuthorInfo", "BorrowButton"]}, {"name": "Borrowing History", "route": "/history", "components": ["Navbar", "HistoryTable", "StatusBadge"]}], "shared_components": ["Navbar", "Footer", "Button", "Card", "Table", "Badge"], "features": ["book catalog browsing", "book categories", "book details", "borrowing history", "search books"]}, "backend": {"endpoints": [{"method": "GET", "path": "/api/catalog", "purpose": "Fetch catalog books"}, {"method": "GET", "path": "/api/catalog/:id", "purpose": "Fetch detailed book data"}, {"method": "GET", "path": "/api/history", "purpose": "Fetch borrowing history"}]}, "database": {"tables": [{"name": "books", "columns": ["id", "title", "author", "category", "publisher", "description"]}, {"name": "users", "columns": ["id", "name", "email", "role"]}, {"name": "borrowing_history", "columns": ["id", "user_id", "book_id", "borrow_date", "return_date", "status"]}]}, "auth_required": true}

Create a fitness dashboard where users can log workouts and track progress.

{"app_name": "Personal Fitness Tracking Dashboard", "app_type": "web_app", "description": "A fitness tracking dashboard that allows users to log workouts, monitor fitness progress, and view performance analytics.", "target_users": ["fitness_users"], "frontend": {"pages": [{"name": "Dashboard", "route": "/", "components": ["Navbar", "ProgressCharts", "WorkoutSummaryCard"]}, {"name": "Log Workout", "route": "/log-workout", "components": ["Navbar", "WorkoutForm", "ExerciseSelector"]}, {"name": "Progress", "route": "/progress", "components": ["Navbar", "ProgressChart", "GoalTracker"]}], "shared_components": ["Navbar", "Button", "Card", "Chart"], "features": ["workout logging", "progress tracking", "fitness charts", "goal tracking"]}, "backend": {"endpoints": [{"method": "POST", "path": "/api/workouts", "purpose": "Log user workout"}, {"method": "GET", "path": "/api/workouts", "purpose": "Fetch workout history"}, {"method": "GET", "path": "/api/progress", "purpose": "Fetch progress statistics"}]}, "database": {"tables": [{"name": "users", "columns": ["id", "name", "email"]}, {"name": "workouts", "columns": ["id", "user_id", "exercise_name", "duration_minutes", "calories_burned", "workout_date"]}]}, "auth_required": true}

Build a course registration system where students can enroll in courses and see registered subjects.

{"app_name": "Course Registration System", "app_type": "web_app", "description": "A web application for students to browse offered courses, enroll in available subjects, and review their registered courses.", "target_users": ["students", "academic_admin"], "frontend": {"pages": [{"name": "Home", "route": "/", "components": ["Navbar", "HeroSection", "RegistrationInfo", "Footer"]}, {"name": "Login", "route": "/login", "components": ["Navbar", "LoginForm"]}, {"name": "Offered Courses", "route": "/offered-courses", "components": ["Navbar", "CourseTable", "DepartmentFilter", "EnrollButton"]}, {"name": "Registered Courses", "route": "/registered-courses", "components": ["Navbar", "RegisteredCourseTable", "CreditSummaryCard"]}], "shared_components": ["Navbar", "Footer", "Button", "Card", "Table"], "features": ["student login", "browse offered courses", "course enrollment", "view registered courses", "credit summary"]}, "backend": {"endpoints": [{"method": "POST", "path": "/api/login", "purpose": "Authenticate student"}, {"method": "GET", "path": "/api/offered-courses", "purpose": "Fetch offered courses for registration"}, {"method": "POST", "path": "/api/register-course", "purpose": "Enroll student in selected course"}, {"method": "GET", "path": "/api/registered-courses", "purpose": "Fetch student registered courses"}]}, "database": {"tables": [{"name": "students", "columns": ["id", "name", "email", "password", "department", "semester"]}, {"name": "courses", "columns": ["id", "course_code", "course_name", "credit_hours", "department"]}, {"name": "registrations", "columns": ["id", "student_id", "course_id", "registered_at"]}]}, "auth_required": true}

Create a hostel mess management website where students can view today’s menu, pre-book meals, and check meal history.

{"app_name": "Hostel Mess Management Portal", "app_type": "web_app", "description": "A portal for hostel students to view daily meals, pre-book food, and review their meal booking history.", "target_users": ["students", "mess_staff"], "frontend": {"pages": [{"name": "Home", "route": "/", "components": ["Navbar", "HeroSection", "TodayMenuPreview", "Footer"]}, {"name": "Login", "route": "/login", "components": ["Navbar", "LoginForm"]}, {"name": "Today's Menu", "route": "/menu", "components": ["Navbar", "MealCardList", "MealTimeTabs"]}, {"name": "Pre-Booking", "route": "/booking", "components": ["Navbar", "BookingForm", "MealSelectionCard", "ConfirmButton"]}, {"name": "Meal History", "route": "/history", "components": ["Navbar", "HistoryTable", "DateFilter"]}], "shared_components": ["Navbar", "Footer", "Button", "Card"], "features": ["student login", "view daily menu", "meal pre-booking", "booking confirmation", "meal history"]}, "backend": {"endpoints": [{"method": "POST", "path": "/api/login", "purpose": "Authenticate student"}, {"method": "GET", "path": "/api/menu/today", "purpose": "Fetch today's meal menu"}, {"method": "POST", "path": "/api/bookings", "purpose": "Create meal pre-booking"}, {"method": "GET", "path": "/api/bookings", "purpose": "Fetch meal booking history"}]}, "database": {"tables": [{"name": "students", "columns": ["id", "name", "email", "password", "hostel_block"]}, {"name": "daily_menus", "columns": ["id", "date", "meal_type", "menu_details"]}, {"name": "meal_bookings", "columns": ["id", "student_id", "menu_id", "booking_date", "status"]}]}, "auth_required": true}

{"app_name": "Resort Booking and Inquiry Website", "app_type": "web_app", "description": "A resort website for viewing image galleries, booking rooms, and sending customer inquiries.", "target_users": ["guests", "resort_staff"], "frontend": {"pages": [{"name": "Home", "route": "/", "components": ["Navbar", "HeroSection", "ResortHighlights", "Footer"]}, {"name": "Gallery", "route": "/gallery", "components": ["Navbar", "ImageGalleryGrid", "CategoryTabs"]}, {"name": "Book Stay", "route": "/book-stay", "components": ["Navbar", "BookingForm", "RoomSelectionCard", "DatePicker"]}, {"name": "Contact", "route": "/contact", "components": ["Navbar", "InquiryForm", "ContactInfoCard", "MapSection"]}], "shared_components": ["Navbar", "Footer", "Button", "Card", "FormInput"], "features": ["resort gallery", "stay booking", "customer inquiry form", "room selection"]}, "backend": {"endpoints": [{"method": "GET", "path": "/api/gallery", "purpose": "Fetch resort gallery images"}, {"method": "POST", "path": "/api/bookings", "purpose": "Create resort stay booking"}, {"method": "POST", "path": "/api/inquiries", "purpose": "Submit customer inquiry"}]}, "database": {"tables": [{"name": "gallery_items", "columns": ["id", "image_url", "category", "caption"]}, {"name": "bookings", "columns": ["id", "guest_name", "email", "room_type", "check_in_date", "check_out_date"]}, {"name": "inquiries", "columns": ["id", "name", "email", "message", "submitted_at"]}]}, "auth_required": false}

{"app_name": "Student Academic Portal", "app_type": "web_app", "description": "A portal for students to log in and access academic information such as enrolled courses, attendance records, and grades.", "target_users": ["students", "faculty_admin"], "frontend": {"pages": [{"name": "Home", "route": "/", "components": ["Navbar", "HeroSection", "PortalHighlights", "Footer"]}, {"name": "Login", "route": "/login", "components": ["Navbar", "LoginForm"]}, {"name": "Courses", "route": "/courses", "components": ["Navbar", "CourseCardGrid", "SemesterFilter"]}, {"name": "Attendance", "route": "/attendance", "components": ["Navbar", "AttendanceTable", "ProgressCard"]}, {"name": "Grades", "route": "/grades", "components": ["Navbar", "GradesTable", "GpaSummaryCard"]}], "shared_components": ["Navbar", "Footer", "Button", "Card", "Table"], "features": ["student login", "view enrolled courses", "attendance tracking", "grades overview", "semester filtering"]}, "backend": {"endpoints": [{"method": "POST", "path": "/api/login", "purpose": "Authenticate student login"}, {"method": "GET", "path": "/api/courses", "purpose": "Fetch enrolled student courses"}, {"method": "GET", "path": "/api/attendance", "purpose": "Fetch attendance records"}, {"method": "GET", "path": "/api/grades", "purpose": "Fetch student grades"}]}, "database": {"tables": [{"name": "students", "columns": ["id", "name", "email", "password", "department", "semester"]}, {"name": "courses", "columns": ["id", "course_code", "course_name", "credit_hours", "semester"]}, {"name": "attendance_records", "columns": ["id", "student_id", "course_id", "attendance_percentage"]}, {"name": "grades", "columns": ["id", "student_id", "course_id", "grade", "gpa_points"]}]}, "auth_required": true}

{"app_name": "Student Fee Management Portal", "app_type": "web_app", "description": "A fee portal that allows students to view outstanding dues, payment records, and download invoice documents.", "target_users": ["students", "finance_office"], "frontend": {"pages": [{"name": "Home", "route": "/", "components": ["Navbar", "HeroSection", "FeeSummaryCard", "Footer"]}, {"name": "Login", "route": "/login", "components": ["Navbar", "LoginForm"]}, {"name": "Dues", "route": "/dues", "components": ["Navbar", "DueTable", "OutstandingAmountCard"]}, {"name": "Payment History", "route": "/payments", "components": ["Navbar", "PaymentTable", "DateFilter"]}, {"name": "Invoices", "route": "/invoices", "components": ["Navbar", "InvoiceList", "DownloadButton"]}], "shared_components": ["Navbar", "Footer", "Button", "Card", "Table"], "features": ["student login", "view fee dues", "payment history", "download invoices", "date filtering"]}, "backend": {"endpoints": [{"method": "POST", "path": "/api/login", "purpose": "Authenticate student"}, {"method": "GET", "path": "/api/dues", "purpose": "Fetch outstanding student dues"}, {"method": "GET", "path": "/api/payments", "purpose": "Fetch payment history"}, {"method": "GET", "path": "/api/invoices", "purpose": "Fetch invoice list and download links"}]}, "database": {"tables": [{"name": "students", "columns": ["id", "name", "email", "password", "registration_number"]}, {"name": "fee_dues", "columns": ["id", "student_id", "amount", "due_date", "status"]}, {"name": "payments", "columns": ["id", "student_id", "amount_paid", "payment_date", "payment_method"]}, {"name": "invoices", "columns": ["id", "student_id", "invoice_number", "invoice_date", "file_url"]}]}, "auth_required": true}
